/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/example.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/example.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/example.dir/src/core/collision.cpp.o CMakeFiles/example.dir/src/core/numberf.cpp.o CMakeFiles/example.dir/src/core/tile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/example.dir/src/scene/entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/example.dir/src/scene/main_camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/example.dir/src/scene/object.cpp.o CMakeFiles/example.dir/src/scene/tree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/example.dir/src/utils/global.cpp.o -o example  /usr/lib/libraylib.so -L/usr/lib -lraylib
